svg.aria-label: The complete monitored platform. Top: the controlled machine holding plus or minus 1 mm and a live model with observer on the same commands, feeding a residual monitor, a diagnosis block, and an estimator tracking the leak rate. Middle: a timeline of a developing leak - position stays flat on target inside the band while the leak rate rises; detection fires early at about 2.4 mm/s, and the hold would fail far later at about 50 mm/s, the gap being the lead time for planned maintenance. Footer: the curriculum layers from fluid to monitor, all built.
svg.text: Built, modeled, controlled — and now watching itself against its own design.
DEVELOPING LEAK: the controller masks it, the monitor catches it early
position: holds ±1 mm on target (controller masking)
A 2-tonne platform that lifts, holds ±1 mm, and knows whether it is behaving as designed — curriculum complete.
